atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports annual exam and ongoing depression and chronic back pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports struggling with depression over the past year due to remote work and social isolation.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports that his depression has been on and off.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient believes increasing his dose of prozac might help.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports chronic back pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports that his back pain is exacerbated by prolonged sitting.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports that the pain is often worse when sitting and improves with movement.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies numbness or tingling in his legs.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has a history of congenital artery bypass grafting at age 27.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is currently taking prozac 20 milligrams daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a 'falling asleep' sensation.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports no distress

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The neck is unremarkable

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Heart rate is 68 beats per minute with a regular rhythm and a three out of six systolic ejection murmur

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Lungs are clear to auscultation

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The abdomen is soft

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Lumbar spine examination reveals decreased flexion and pain to palpation

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Lower extremity strength is normal, and there is no edema

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: An ECG shows stable findings from last year

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Lumbar spine x-rays are stable from last year

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: An echocardiogram reveals no acute abnormalities

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient presents with chronic depression

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient presents with chronic back pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Order a physical therapy referral for the chronic back pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Increase the prozac dosage from 20 milligrams to 40 milligrams, one tablet daily
